string 2: I thought I told you to stay put!

You really think you're in any kind of position
to give me orders?

I seem to remember you constantly ignoring
whatever Mom and I said.

Besides, what do you hope to accomplish on your own?
Your attacks have pretty much no effect.
Maybe he doesn't want to hurt them in the first place.
He's using those tranquilizer bullets they mentioned...

Yeah, I think you're right...
That human is trying to help our friends.

Then we can't just stand by and do nothing...!
We need to help that man!

Yes, let's go!
We can all work together!
Ngh!

Come to your senses!
This is no time to be fighting each other!
My partner... My precious... companion...
Give me back my partner at once...!
It's no use... He's not listening!
Grrraaagh!
GWAAAAAGH!
Huh—?!
Hngh!
GAAAGH!
Wh-What?!
Ngh...!
What are you even trying to do...?!

You're using tranquilizer bullets...
Are you TRYING to get yourself killed?!

Digimon have families, too...
When I think of it that way, I just can't hurt them...
You'll understand once you have kids of your own.
Y-You idiot!
You were willing to put yourself in serious danger for us...

Do you not hate Digimon?
Even after the way they destroyed your world...?
Kyoko...

You came here with my daughter...
That alone is enough of an answer for me.
I see... Thank you!

Your courage and compassion remind us
of what our own partners show us.

Yes... As long as there are people like you around,
I am certain that Digimon and humans can exist together.
We must do what we can... to match your spirit!
GRAAAAAAAAAAGH!
A-Argh!

I WILL make you come to your senses!
Come on, now! Let's do this!
Still no luck...?!
Use this...!
UAAAGH! G-Gragh...
Urgh...
What... have I...?
I must apologize for my actions.
Because of me, that human is...

Don't worry about it.
Parallelmon is responsible for all of this.
If he says not to worry, then there's no need for concern.

That being said, he does need treatment...
We need to defeat Parallelmon and get home, fast.
I agree. Let's go!
I wonder why they're glowing...
Wait... I can hear something coming from inside them!
It is the voices of our partners!
So this is where they are!
Hold on... I'll get you out!
Ngh...!
It's no use...!

Their voices are growing fainter...!
We're going to run out of time!
Don't give up! We'll help you rescue them!

Are... you sure?
I thought you hated Digimon...
On top of that, I... even hurt your father.
Don't... worry about that. At all.

As a kid, I would cry, and cry, and cry...
But I'm no longer that person.

Now, I also want to believe—that humans and Digimon
can coexist... and form bonds of friendship.
Kyoko...
My father didn't give up on Digimon...

...so you can't give up, either.
You need to help your partners.
Very well.

Thank you. For believing in Digimon...
for believing in us.
We will do what we can to match your compassion!

In order to destroy these bubbles,
it seems we must defeat Parallelmon first.
Please... stay safe until we're able to return!
I-Is he all right?!

He's just out cold. But he does need treatment
as soon as possible.
I'll leave it to you from here on out.

In the meantime, I'll be waiting here...
I can't leave my dad's side.
We understand.
Hee hee...
What's so funny?
I think that's the first time I've heard you call him "dad."
N-Never mind that! You need to get going!
...Okay.

We'll definitely defeat Parallelmon!
And then, we can all go back to our original world!
